title: Validation report for ada.bbr.metadata.adaProperties.image - Image Type

entries.message:
Validation result for _sources/adaProperties/image/rules.shacl:
  Validation Report
  Conforms: False
  Results (1):
  Constraint Violation in MinCountConstraintComponent (http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#MinCountConstraintComponent):
  	Severity: sh:Violation
  	Source Shape: [ sh:message Literal("An image must have a componentType.") ; sh:minCount Literal("1", datatype=xsd:integer) ; sh:path ada:componentType ]
  	Focus Node: [ rdf:type ada:image, schema1:ImageObject ]
  	Result Path: ada:componentType
  	Message: An image must have a componentType.
